category_sources: source_facts.description says Dory is a development proxy for Docker; official repository describes it as a development proxy for docker.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dory; official repository title uses Dory/dory.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/FreedomBen/dory, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official repository description support Docker development proxy and CLI tags.
